name: White Chocolate Cream Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 Ounces White Chocolate (Cut into Small Pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, evaporated milk, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches 237°F on a candy thermometer.
3. Remove from heat and stir in marshmallow cream, white chocolate pieces, pecans, and candied cherries.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 13 by 9-inch pan.
5. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 12 dozen pieces.
6. Serve as desired.
